PostToolUse.description: Auto-format files after Claude edits them
Log all bash commands for auditing

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|--force|--no-verify' && echo 'BLOCKED: dangerous command' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env|\.pem|credentials|secrets' && echo 'BLOCKED: sensitive file' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

Notification.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || true
Notification.description: Desktop notification when Claude needs input (macOS and Linux)
